---
title: "Contact"
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-5}

**Hunter Martaindale**\
ALERRT Center\
Texas State University\
San Marcos, TX

**Email:** [MartaindaleLLC\@gmail.com](mailto:MartaindaleLLC@gmail.com)

**Links**

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=_7PlqKYAAAAJ)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/huntermartaindale)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/hmartaindale/)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8100-7698)
- [ALERRT Center](https://alerrt.org)

For consulting or expert witness inquiries, please use the dedicated [Consulting](consulting.qmd) page.

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-7}

<!-- TODO: Replace YOUR_FORMSPREE_FORM_ID (same account as consulting.qmd,
     or create a separate form for general contact). -->

<form action="https://formspree.io/f/mykbwyyn" method="POST">
  <div class="mb-3">
    <label for="g-name" class="form-label">Name</label>
    <input type="text" class="form-control" id="g-name" name="name" required>
  </div>
  <div class="mb-3">
    <label for="g-email" class="form-label">Email</label>
    <input type="email" class="form-control" id="g-email" name="email" required>
  </div>
  <div class="mb-3">
    <label for="g-message" class="form-label">Message</label>
    <textarea class="form-control" id="g-message" name="message" rows="5" required></textarea>
  </div>
  <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Send</button>
</form>

:::

:::
